# Access Denied

_Nothing rendered: the site served an explicit access-denied page (edgesuite) to this browser. Retry with `--headed` (a real browser window — verification walls usually clear for a headed session) or `--fallback-headed` (cheap headless first, headed only if access is denied). In the reader, `O` opens the page in your browser and `C` retries headed, then keeps headed capture for that host in this reader session._
